# .papermill.md — Paper State File
<!-- Auto-generated by papermill:init · 2026-02-17 -->

## Status: MERGED

This paper has been merged into **01-identifiability** as of 2026-02-17.

See: `../01-identifiability/.papermill.md`

## Rationale

Papers 01 (identifiability/diagnostic design) and 02 (Fisher information loss) address the same fundamental question — quantifying how masking degrades estimation — from complementary angles:

- 01 provides **structural conditions** (graph theory, matrix rank)
- 02 provides **quantitative measurement** (Fisher decomposition, effective sample size)

Together they form a natural arc: "is theta identifiable?" → "how precisely?" → "how to design diagnostics?"

The merged paper re-derives key exponential-case results (FIM, monotone info loss) for self-containment rather than delegating to expo-masked-fim.

## Original Brief

The research brief (`brief.md`) in this directory remains as reference material for the merged paper.
